programme.title: Nagbibinata
programme.desc: A group of teenagers tries to overcome the pressures and challenges of growing up, from relationships to studies and career choices.

programme.title: That Thing Called Tadhana
programme.desc: A woman struggling to meet airline baggage requirements meets a man who comes to her aid. They form a friendship that helps them mend each other's hearts.

programme.title: Tiyanaks
programme.desc: A group of school friends go on an out of town trip with their professor. The group loses their way and with no choice left, stays at a desolate house where they experience the presence of evil that look like children.

programme.title: Iukit Mo Sa Bala!
programme.desc: Bobby returns home after his father, Mayor Guerrero, gets injured in an ambush. However, things take a new turn when his ex-girlfriend marries into the Velez family.

programme.title: Lisensyado
programme.desc: Aladin, a stalwart policeman, often makes enemies while on the job. During one of his missions, Aladin meets Carlos, the leader of a syndicate who is hell-bent on killing him as revenge.

programme.title: Pagpag: Siyam na Buhay
programme.desc: People attend a wake in the Philippines and shake off the spirits of the dead before heading home.

programme.title: Pakners
programme.desc: Manuel is a victim of a financial scam. His path crosses with Nanding, a jeepney driver with a plan for them to seek wealth through billiards.

programme.title: The Hows of Us
programme.desc: A young couple dream of growing old together as they deal with the struggles of being in a long-term relationship.

programme.title: Onsehan
programme.desc: A thief from a rival gang is set up as a target just as he is about to quit his mob. Now, he must fight with all that he has to escape his doom.

programme.title: Santigwar
programme.desc: When a group of fun-seeking boys heads to an abandoned town, Hasmin discovers the truth that binds her Santigwar family to the Aswangs.

programme.title: Para Sa Hopeless Romantic
programme.desc: A student writer struggles to find a happy ending to her romantic novel after her real-life romance falls apart.

programme.title: The Hows of Us
programme.desc: A young couple dream of growing old together as they deal with the struggles of being in a long-term relationship.

programme.title: Spirit Warriors
programme.desc: A group of high school kids who are fascinated by the supernatural battle a malevolent spirit - the Ulanaya.

programme.title: Good morning, titser
programme.desc: Local thief Pedro and his child accomplice Letlet decide to escape in a bid to evade arrest by the authorities. On their way, they come across Consuelo, a teacher.

programme.title: Iligpit si Victor Sarraza
programme.desc: A group of rebels save Victor, a soldier, from getting imprisoned. In exchange for his salvation, Victor is forced to work for them.

programme.title: S.P.A.R.K
programme.desc: A troublemaker campus crush meets a simple country girl during summertime in Vigan.

programme.title: Maria, Leonora, Teresa
programme.desc: Faith, Julio, and Stella are given life-sized dolls to cope with a tragedy, but the toys are controlled by a sinister master.

programme.title: Wang Wang, Buhay Bombero
programme.desc: Firefighters Jordan and Michael get suspended from the force for making errors. However, they find out that an unknown assailant has sabotaged their operations, and they enlist Molina to investigate.

programme.title: Mariano Mison... NBI
programme.desc: Mariano Mison, an agent known for his dedication and integrity, earns the NBI's director post because of his service. When the Vizconde family is shockingly massacred, he is tasked to investigate the murders and find the culprit.

programme.title: Pretty Boy Hoodlum
programme.desc: Senatorial aspirant Bobby hires Alex, a prisoner known as Pretty Boy, as his hitman to kill his political opponents.

programme.title: Blue Moon
programme.desc: The mostly true tale of a man who travels to rural eastern Kentucky to deal with the unexpected death of his estranged father.

programme.title: Txt
programme.desc: A dead man (Oyo Sotto) reaches out from the grave to keep his still-living lover (Angel Locsin) for himself.

programme.desc: Following in his father's footsteps, Lt. Frank Drebin Jr. has the particular set of skills... to lead Police Squad and save the world!

programme.title: Blood Diamond
programme.desc: A smuggler, fisherman and reporter team up in search of a priceless pink diamond, a lost son and the dark story behind the diamond trade.

programme.title: Land of Gold
programme.desc: A truck driver finds a young Mexican American girl inside his shipping container and his life takes a turn as he tries to reunite her with her family.

programme.title: The Room Next Door
programme.desc: Ingrid and Martha were close friends in their youth. After years of being out of touch, they meet again in an extreme but strangely sweet situation.

programme.title: Hustle & Flow
programme.desc: A pimp-cum-drug-dealer suffering from a mid-life crisis forms a band with his pal to reignite his passion for music.

programme.title: Smallfoot
programme.desc: The Bigfoot legend is turned upside down when a bright young Yeti finds something he thought didn’t exist—a human.

programme.title: Margot At the Wedding
programme.desc: An unflinchingly honest story of a family in distress. Stars Nicole Kidman and Jack Black.

programme.title: Missing You
programme.desc: When Hee-Joo was 7 years old, her father was murdered. The killer, Ki-Bum, was eventually arrested. Hee-Joo has waited patiently for Ki-Bum's release.

programme.title: The Attorney
programme.desc: When tax attorney Song Woo-Suk agrees to defend a student activist who was arrested and tortured into giving a false confession, his entire life and worldview begin to change drastically.

programme.title: Deadman
programme.desc: An ace in the barge business makes money by selling his name, is falsely accused of embezzling billions. He fights to reclaim his stolen life from those tied to him solely by name.

programme.title: The Long Way Home
programme.desc: During the Korean war, a South Korean soldier, is ordered to deliver a classified document but gets attacked and loses it. A clumsy North Korean solider picks it up, and they eventually meet at the western front.

programme.title: Confession
programme.desc: Three lifelong friends get wrapped up in a robbery-arson case. Suspicious of the investigation and the police, Hyun-tae starts digging for the truth himself and asks his best friend for help.

programme.title: Cart
programme.desc: As a social critique, ‘Cart’ tells a story of the employees of a retail supermarket band together when the contract workers are summarily laid off.

programme.title: The Night Owl
programme.desc: A blind acupuncturist, who strangely, is able to see normally at night, happens to witness the death of the crown prince.

programme.title: The Exclusive: Beat The Devil's Tattoo
programme.desc: When a journalist discovers that his exclusive story on a serial killer was based on false information, he fabricates more lies to cover his mistake.

programme.title: Waiting For Rain
programme.desc: An unmotivated student regains his passion for life after exchanging letters with his childhood friend and promise to meet if it rains on December 31st each year.

programme.title: The Devil's Deal
programme.desc: A national assembly candidate, a hidden politics powerhouse and a gangster rivals for a top secret document that will shake the nation's core.

programme.title: Hidden Face
programme.desc: While Sung-jin is searching for his fiancée Su-yeon, he meets her friend Mi-ju. A breathtaking thriller unfolds in which Su-yeon, who is trapped in a secret room, witnesses a naked truth.

programme.title: The Beauty Inside Finale
programme.desc: Top actress Han Se-gye lives with others' appearance one week out of every month. Seo Do-jae is an executive director of an airline company, who suffers from prosopagnosia. The two fall in love eventually.

programme.title: Pilot
programme.desc: Han Jung-woo. a star pilot suffers a drastic fall due to a momentary mistake was blacklisted from all airline. In a desperate bid for survival, he adopts a new identity as his younger sister and manages to find re-employment, yet this newfound stability is soon threatened...

programme.title: Big Match
programme.desc: A man framed for murder battles a game planner who is intent on turning a city into one giant game board that he can control.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: Everyone is decorating special balloons in Toyland. They're going to have a big Balloon Release at the end of the day and see how far they can fly. But when Noddy returns in the afternoon with Big Ears, the balloons have already flown away! Noddy decides to investigate. Following all the clues, he arrives at Deltoid's house. The action hero toy tells him that he only took back his specially decorated balloon. The others were still there earlier. Noddy works out that when Deltoid took his balloon, he retried the strings of the others with a knot that came undone. The balloons are flying away! Revs quickly converts to helicopter mode and Noddy is able to catch the balloons before they fly away for good. Back at Toy Green later, Deltoid is persuaded to release his balloon alongside the other balloons and this time the Balloon Release takes place without any problems at all. Well done Deltoid and well done Noddy!

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: Noddy and his friends are building a toy tower. Carlton is joining in and having a great time. They've almost finished when one of the brick pieces goes missing! Oh no. How can they finish the tower without the last brick? Noddy needs to investigate. Using his detecting skills Noddy soon finds the missing brick. But when he gets back to the Toy Green to finish the tower, he discovers that another brick has gone missing! What's going on? This investigation is really complicated! Noddy works out that the bricks were taken by Carlton. The big cat admits that he was having so much fun playing that he didn't want the game to end! Everyone forgives him and they decide to carry on playing all afternoon, all thanks to Noddy! Well done!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a tin full of Cakey-like cupcake kitties, she realizes... Cakey's Cousins are coming to visit! Cakey welcomes his Cousins to the dollhouse and leads them through a fun-filled itinerary of activities, but quickly realizes his cousins have an agenda of their own. For our Gabby Cat of the Day segment, Pillow Cat sings a song!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Gabby and Pandy accidentally get turned teeny-tiny when one of Mercat's potions spills. To get back to their normal size, they need to find the right ingredients to make a grow potion, which means going on an itty-bitty search through the dollhouse! For our Cat of the Day segment, Mercat shows us how to make sparkly, mermaid slime.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: The kids have a race to decide who gets to try some extremely rare berries. / When Scallop finds a beautiful and mysterious sea sculpture, she enlists the help of her friends to search the sea for the artist behind the masterpiece.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: When Pixie struggles to recreate an old tradition perfectly, the kids realize they can make their own traditions./ A story told by Chef J inspires Juniper to go in search of snow.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: Tag chooses to pair up with her Grandpaw for the Barker Family Talent Show, and together, they search for their winning talent. \ Tag is surprised to learn that today is the Pawston Snoozie-a-Hullabaloozie. With everything shut down for the day, Tag and Scooch take the opportunity to play all over town, while trying not to wake up other dogs.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: Tag can't wait to show off her car at the car show. But when Cheddar Biscuit wants to come along and pick up her clown friends along the way, Tag is wary that Cheddar Biscuit will steal her thunder. \ The Not Yet Cadets can't wait to watch Sam’s big race. But when Sam loses his car key, he challenges the Not Yet Cadets to race around town to find it.

programme.title: Dinotrux
programme.desc: Half dinosaur! Half construction truck! Full-on fun! Watch giant Ty Rux, his little buddy Revvit and the crew come face-to-face with evil D-Structs.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free
programme.desc: Lucky rushes to complete all of last year’s resolutions before the clock strikes midnight on New Year’s Eve

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods
programme.desc: After getting hit on the head, Eep has a vision and sets out to get the Valley to show how thankful they are; Grug feels like he's the biggest joke in Ahhh Valley, so he asks Thunk to make a “buy-o-pic” of him to show people just how truly great he is

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods
programme.desc: Lerk and Thunk hide all the valley's worms in a cave to protect them from the hunters who want to use them as bait; Grug invents the spear and pitches it to the Valley as a tool that will change cavemanity forever!

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: After a strange creature bites Tuffnut, he believes he'll turn into a legendary Lycanwing dragon when the moon is full unless his friends can save him

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: When Snotlout and Astrid must fly a ceremonial battle axe to a family wedding, they must work together when an Armorwing dragon derails their plan

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Po and team go to the city of Tikal to get more information on the Protector, but it's easier said than done, since nobody in the town actually knows the identity of the Protector. Blade becomes increasingly frustrated and Po attempts to help her.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Po and team play a game of Pok-ta-pok against a family of armadillos for the opportunity to talk one on one with Zuma, the leader. The game brings out a highly competitive and aggressive side to Blade, known as "The Beast." Back in China, Colin and Weimin find the Pirate Queen and become part of her pirate crew.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Feline popstar sensation Fluffy Flufferton is performing a concert at the Dollhouse Hotel, and Gabby unboxes tickets to see her! Gabby meets Fluffy and discovers that she’s afraid to try new things because she doesn’t want to make mistakes—why mess with perfection? But with the help of the Gabby Cats, Fluffy learns how to fail fantastically and be the most fluff-tastic version of herself. For our Cat of the Day segment, DJ Catnip sings a song about the Dollhouse Hotel.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a tin full of Cakey-like cupcake kitties, she realizes... Cakey's Cousins are coming to visit! Cakey welcomes his Cousins to the dollhouse and leads them through a fun-filled itinerary of activities, but quickly realizes his cousins have an agenda of their own. For our Gabby Cat of the Day segment, Pillow Cat sings a song!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Gabby and Pandy accidentally get turned teeny-tiny when one of Mercat's potions spills. To get back to their normal size, they need to find the right ingredients to make a grow potion, which means going on an itty-bitty search through the dollhouse! For our Cat of the Day segment, Mercat shows us how to make sparkly, mermaid slime.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: Boss thought that breaking his arm was painful;but the true pain starts at pediatrician Dr. Kevin’s “jokes.” Boss enlists the playgroup babies to defang the doctor of his “comedian’s disease.” Tim obsesses about keeping his little brother safe.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: Boss has an opportunity to get his old job back at Baby Corp;but to get the interview;he’ll need the playgroup babies to help him escape Marsha Krinkle’s super-safe Bubbeezee playroom. Tim nearly misses Kabob Day at school.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: Boss comes face to face with his old nemesis;Bug The Pug;after the playgroup parents decide to throw a Puppy Party. Staci creates a “No-Paperworkist” movement to avoid Buddy From HR’s constant paperwork.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: A run-of-the-mill arts and crafts session turns into an interdimensional adventure from which Harold, George and company may never return.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: Krupp's campers take on rich rivals in a hoity-toity boat race that also features a revenge-obsessed giant salamander. Paging Captain Underpants!

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: The campers' splat-tastic game of paintball is rather rudely interrupted by a foul and formidable fiend known only as Camoflush.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Shashi stages a race up the privately-owned Mount Zebulon, and he invites Tony, Cisco, and Margaret “Echo” Pearl to participate. The crew soon discovers that Shashi is using the race to steal another super-car (this time from space!) – and he knows that Tony is working with the feds.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Ms. Nowhere tells the kids that the failed mission is over, but Tony isn’t ready to give up, and he’s determined to rescue Frostee. The crew goes rogue by deciding to steal the final key from Shashi and trade it for their friend.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Shashi finally reveals his master plan.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: Hiccup doesn't know who to trust when Viggo and Ryker each tell him that the other has gone rogue, and is sidetracked when a new dragon attacks.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: An extremely powerful new dragon attacks Dragon's Edge, and Hiccup makes a dangerous alliance while the fate of the Dragon Eye hangs in the balance.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: After Hiccup is shot down on a remote island while searching for Viggo and the Dragon Hunters, he questions Dagur's intentions to rescue him.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: The Eternal Night covers Arcadia in shadow leading to a long awaited fight between the Trollhunter and Gunmar130226

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: To end the Eternal Night, Jim and the Trollhuntersmust risk everything in their battle against Gunmar.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Toby, Claire, and Blinky work to keep the human world unaware of Jim’s absence as they look for ways to rescue him from the Darklands

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Po's moral lines are blurred when he and Blade have to break an untrustworthy hedgehog monk (Zhen) out of jail to get more information on what Klaus and Veruca stole from the Lotus. They learn from Zhen that there are in fact three more weapons, and Po recognizes one of them from a comic book.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Po and Blade must convince a deceased comic book writer's son to give them information about an unreleased comic that may point them toward the next weapon: a whip of fire. However, after the events of 103 Po is now a wanted criminal, so the Emperor's Forbidden Company arrives and captures him. Torn between saving Po and the mission she's sworn to complete, Blade flees and abandons Po.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: A mysterious figure helps Po escape the guards, so Po makes his way to a desert market, determined to prove Blade wrong for leaving him behind. But when he accidentally stumbles into Klaus and Veruca, he and Blade awkwardly reunite while giving chase, and work through their differences. But the mysterious figure has followed Po and tries to capture them, clearly a new threat to our team.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Armed with the power of Gaylen's Core, Morando's forces attack Arcadia as the Royals fight to protect their lives and their adopted Earth home.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: In the final battle against Morando, Aja and Krel must make an unexpected sacrifice to win the day to save their Akiridion and Earthen homes.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: The evil General Morando launches a coup on the alien planet Akiridion-5. In the ensuing battle, the planet's King and Queen are severely injured, and their surviving son Krel and daughter Aja escape the planet with military commander, Varvatos Vex. They seek refuge on a backwater planet: Earth.

programme.title: Turbo F.A.S.T.
programme.desc: Turbo and Whiplash meet a strange tick who may be out to harm Turbo.//When the crew starts a prank war, Chet is nervous that he is the next target.

programme.title: Turbo F.A.S.T.
programme.desc: White Shadow quits racing and it's up to Turbo to convince him to get back on the track.//The crew becomes detectives and meets a strange new creature.

programme.title: Archibald's Next Big Thing
programme.desc: Archibald scores a job as a movie star's stunt double. Loy starts to lose it after getting a disappointing score on Archibald's karaoke video game.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: It's Fable Forest Rainbow Day when the big rainbow in Fable Forest sparkles and pops like a giant firework. Everyone is looking forward to it until the colours start fading from the rainbow! Noddy needs to investigate before the rainbow disappears for good! Revs converts into a helicopter so that Noddy and Bumpy can fly over the rainbow to find the pot of rainbow gold. They discover that Cloppycorn has been taking the gold from the pot to give his unicorn horn a special golden glow. He didn't realise that the gold was the source of the rainbow colours. Noddy persuades Cloppycorn to return the gold to the pot and Rainbow Day goes ahead as planned. Everyone enjoys the gorgeous firework display from the rainbow. Good job, Noddy.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: When Noddy sees Deltoid flying in the air he decides to investigate: how can they get Deltoid down? Realising that magic is involved, Noddy goes to see Queen Sparklewings to see if she can help but she tells him her wand has gone missing. Someone must be trying to do magic with her wand! Meanwhile more flying toys appear, first Fuse and then Smartysaurus. Noddy at last realises that Deltoid, Fuse and Smartysaurus were all in the middle of making a wish when the magic happened and that the culprit is Pat-Pat, who was using Queen Sparklewings' wand to try and make all her friends' wishes come true. Reunited with her wand, Queen Sparklewings is able to bring down the toys. Another successful case for Noddy!

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: The Naughticorns have borrowed Noddy's music player to practise a special dance for Pat-Pat's Pumpkin Party. But when Noddy arrives at the party, the other toys are all scared by a strange noise. Noddy decides to investigate: what's making the scary noise? Using his investigating skills and following all the clues, Noddy arrives at the Naughticorn Stables where he realises that the scary noise is actually a slowed down tune on the music player. The Naughticorns have played it so much that the battery is running out. The Naughticorns have been taking the music player all around Toyland, desperately trying to fix or hide. Noddy reassures them it's not broken, it just needs new batteries in. The Naughticorns say sorry for scaring everyone and Pat-Pat's Pumpkin Party can at last get under way. Well done Noddy!

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: Something upsets all the animals at the farm at night and no one can get to sleep . Farmer Tom asks Noddy to investigate before night falls so that everyone can go to sleep properly. Using his wwwbook to gather clues and using all his investigation skills Noddy travels all over Toyland to find out what has been disturbing the animals. He works out that the new stickers that PatPat gave to the the animals are made out of glow in the dark paper. That's what's been upsetting them all! They couldn't get to sleep because it was too bright! Farmer Tom, Big Ears and Noddy remove all the stickers and everyone settles down for a good night's sleep. Well done Noddy! Shhh!

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Aardvark didn't have a sticky tongue. He had a long nose, big clumsy paws and he found it very difficult to eat. Then one day Aardvark's tongue got stuck in the honey log! All his friends pulled and pulled until KERPLING! Aardvark's tongue finally came unstuck. From that day on Aardvark's tongue was all long and sticky - perfect for eating yummy termites. Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Whale didn't spout. Then one day there is a big storm in Tinga Tinga. The winds blew stronger and the ocean waves got bigger and bigger. Suddenly an enormous wave picks up Whale and carries her all the way from the ocean to the Waterhole. SPLOSH! But Whale was so full of water that she couldn't move! How do the animals help Whale get back to the ocean? For once, Elephant has the answer. Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service
programme.desc: It's a snowy day in Greendale, and Ted Glen has invited the kids to his workshop to meet his friend, space expert Professor Farrow. Julian's excited but so is Pat, who has always yearned to be an astronaut. He's even more thrilled when he finds that his special delivery is a space suit - an extra surprise for the kids. When his van breaks down in a snowy lane, he finds an ingenious solution - only to suffer a puncture - and Ted is unable to help... Meanwhile, Professor Farrow and Lauren take the kids out into the snow and re-create the surface of the moon. Pat's determined to make his delivery, but how will he make it on foot through the snow? As the kids perfect their snowy “moon”, a space-suited figure approaches - Pat in the space suit. Mission Accomplished!

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service
programme.desc: It's Chris Beacon's birthday and he's looking forward to spending the day onshore and having a party at the village hall. Pat's SDS mission is to pick up all the presents from everyone who won't be able to be at the party later. The kids and Lauren are working on decorating the village hall and making Ben a big card from them all whilst Nisha and Ajay provide special birthday cakes for Chris and Micawber and Alf and Dorothy send over lovely fresh eggs and cheese and a special homemade woolly jumper. Meanwhile, the weather is getting worse out at Pencaster Lighthouse and Chris realises, sadly, that he'll have to stay and man the lighthouse and make sure that the passing boats are protected. He won't be able to join everyone for his birthday after all! But Pat has a great idea – if Chris can't come to the birthday party, the birthday party can come to him! With the help of the SDS helicopter Pat delivers all of Chris's birthday presents directly to him at the lighthouse! Everyone contacts Chris by video conference so that even if they can't be there, he's not alone on his birthday! Special delivery service – mission accomplished!

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car
programme.desc: Breeze and Roary swap places for the day (and night). Roary soon discovers the beach is no place for a racing car to live, while Breeze misses the freedom of the beach.

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car
programme.desc: The cars are all gleaming for this evening's race. Roary gets bored and heads out onto the track - with disastrous consequences. Will the cars be ready in time for the big show?

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car
programme.desc: The track inspector is coming to visit and Big Chris is too tired to commentate on the race. A celebrity commentator is brought in to save the day - much to Big Chris' anger.

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car
programme.desc: Christine is due to take part in a dancing competition and is practising at Silver Hatch. But what happens when her dance partner is taken ill?

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: The Ninjas are giving a special display of acrobatics and climbing to Noddy, the Pirates and the Knights. It looks amazing! Noddy goes back to Toy Green to tell Big Ears all about it and narrowly misses being run over by the runaway Pirates Galleon. Someone has taken their sticky anchor and without it they've no way of stopping the ship! Noddy needs to investigate before there's an accident! He follows all the clues which leads him to the Knights. They'd been so impressed by the acrobatics of the Ninjas that they'd borrowed the sticky anchor to help them do acrobatics too! Noddy retrieves the anchor and the Knights apologise for causing such chaos. The Pirates didn't mind though – they LOVE racing about. Thanks to Noddy, the case is closed!

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: When the Builders' traffic cones disappear from their building site, there is chaos all over Brickabuild. Noddy decides to investigate right away and find out who's taken them. Did the Naughticorns take them for their obstacle course? Or was it Farmer Tom who used them to keep his animals under control. Noddy carefully follows the clues and at last discovers it was the Pirates who took them to use as markers for Stripes' Pirate Galleon Driving Test. Noddy tells them about the traffic chaos and the contrite pirates return the cones at once. Best of all – Pirate Stripes has passed her test! Well done Noddy, case closed!

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: When Fuse's collection of Special Things goes missing, Noddy vows to track them down. He soon works out that Bling was in Fuse's Workshop but it turns out that she just went in to add a Special Thing to Fuse's collection. More clues lead Noddy to Smartysaurus. She admits she went into Fuse's Workshop but tripped on an oil can and fled when she saw all the mess she'd made. As for the Special Things, they'd already gone when she got there. Noddy begins to despair but then he works out that the oil can must have been left by whoever took the Special Things. Remembering that Pat-Pat's scooter was squeaky, Noddy goes to the Treehouse and finds the Pockets with Fuse's Special Things. They'd 'found' Fuse's Special Things and taken them to start a collection of their own. They apologies for taking the special things and, as a reward for owning up, Fuse gives them a tool from his workshop to start their own collection. Well done Noddy. Case closed!

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: The Captain is upset because all of his shiny gold coins have been painted grey. It's a disaster as far as the pirates are concerned! Noddy decides to investigate. He realises that the grey coins are actually the gold coin covered with paint. They're not the only things that have turned grey too – Deltoid's shiny gold medal has been painted grey too. After following all the clues, Noddy works out that the Naughticorns are the culprits! They were jealous of anything being shinier or more golden than their shiny gold horns! The Naughticorns apologise to the other toys and soon everyone has their shiny gold coins and medals back to normal again. Phew! Thank you, Noddy! Case Closed.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: It’s Easter-time in the dollhouse! When Gabby unboxes an Easter basket with an orange egg inside, all the Gabby Cats want to know what’s inside, but when CatRat accidentally sends it rolling out of Kitty Fairy’s garden, Gabby and Pandy go on a springtime search through the Dollhouse to find it. Then, when the egg hatches, they meet Eggy, the Easter Kitty Bunny! For our Cat of the Day segment, Baby Box gets crafty.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: There's a mystery in the dollhouse! When things start to mysteriously disappear around the dollhouse, Gabby and Pandy play detectives, using all their senses to find clues, follow them, and solve the mystery. For our COTD segment, CatRat and Baby Me-Owls show us how to make ice cube paints!

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: After Burple and Cutter crash-land in a village of tiny dragons, Burple's unintentional act of courage leads the locals to crown him as their king.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: Magnus's superpowered mechano-dragon threatens to replace the Riders. But when it spirals out of control, the town's real heroes have to step up!

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: When easily-distracted Luis is tasked with getting flowers for his grandmother's birthday party, TZG secretly keeps him on track. / When Rodney's honey bees escape from their apiary (artificial beehive), TZG secretly brings them back.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries
programme.desc: Nicholas keeps stuffing oversized objects inside Eden’s fairy home. But it creates a BIG problem when Harper’s family wants to visit grandma and the car keys are nowhere to be found! / When Harper gets sick, Marcus builds a pulley between their apartments to send Harper treats. But when Qwak, the chipmunk, breaks the pulley, the Dews must step in to keep the treat train running.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: The Ninjas are giving a special display of acrobatics and climbing to Noddy, the Pirates and the Knights. It looks amazing! Noddy goes back to Toy Green to tell Big Ears all about it and narrowly misses being run over by the runaway Pirates Galleon. He follows all the clues which leads him to the Knights. They'd been so impressed by the acrobatics of the Ninjas that they'd borrowed the sticky anchor to help them do acrobatics too! Noddy retrieves the anchor and the Knights apologise for causing such chaos. The Pirates didn't mind though – they LOVE racing about. Thanks to Noddy, the case is closed!

programme.desc: When the Builders' traffic cones disappear from their building site, there is chaos all over Brickabuild. Noddy decides to investigate right away and find out who's taken them. Noddy carefully follows the clues and at last discovers it was the Pirates who took them to use as markers for Stripes' Pirate Galleon Driving Test. Noddy tells them about the traffic chaos and the contrite pirates return the cones at once. Best of all – Pirate Stripes has passed her test! Well done Noddy, case closed!

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: When Fuse's collection of Special Things goes missing, Noddy vows to track them down. He soon works out that Bling was in Fuse's Workshop but it turns out that she just went in to add a Special Thing to Fuse's collection. More clues lead Noddy to Smartysaurus. She admits she went into Fuse's Workshop but tripped on an oil can and fled when she saw all the mess she'd made. As for the Special Things, they'd already gone when she got there. Noddy begins to despair but then he works out that the oil can must have been left by whoever took the Special Things. Remembering that Pat-Pat's scooter was squeaky, Noddy goes to the Treehouse and finds the Pockets with Fuse's Special Things. They'd 'found' Fuse's Special Things and taken them to start a collection of their own. They apologies for taking the special things and, as a reward for owning up, Fuse gives them a tool from his workshop to start their own collection. Well done Noddy. Case closed!

programme.title: Spiritwalker
programme.desc: A memory-impaired man discovers he gains consciousness in a new body every 12 hours. To uncover the truth, he must piece together his real identity while evading attacks from pursuing agents and dangerous criminals alike.

programme.title: The Hunter's Prayer
programme.desc: An assassin is sent to kill a young woman but finds himself unable to pull the trigger. They form an uneasy alliance and flee from their pursuers.

programme.title: The Divine Move 2: The Wrathful
programme.desc: Gwi-soo loses everything at a young age due to his father's gambling in Go. Upon training for years to master the game, he confronts the masters in order to exact revenge

programme.title: Hitman's Wife's Bodyguard
programme.desc: The bodyguard, Michael Bryce, continues his friendship with assassin, Darius Kincaid, as they try to save Darius' wife Sonia.

programme.title: Clown
programme.desc: A loving father becomes a savage killer while wearing a cursed clown costume that won't come off.

programme.title: Project a 2
programme.desc: Sergeant Dragon Ma discovers that his entire unit, except for Shi King, accepts bribes. Dragon is forced to confront Tiger Ow with only Shi King and three of his friends from the Marine Police.

programme.title: Mr-9: Do or Die
programme.desc: An elite Bangladeshi spy teams up with a CIA operative to bring down an international criminal organization headed by a ruthless businessman.

programme.title: Battle of Jangsari
programme.desc: Depicts the diversion attack in Jangsari beach where 772 barely trained, young student soldiers were tossed into Korean war in order to pave the way for the Incheon Landing Operation

programme.title: Acts of Vengeance
programme.desc: A formerly fast-talking lawyer takes a vow of silence and trains himself to avenge the murder of his family

programme.title: Bleeding Steel
programme.desc: A special agent is force to protect his daughter from a far against biotech mutants.

programme.title: Mission Possible
programme.desc: A trainee Chinese spy mistaken a buffoonish private detective for her contact. Together, they seek to uncover a South Korean gun-smuggling ring

programme.title: Logan Lucky
programme.desc: Two brothers attempt to pull off a heist during a NASCAR race in North Carolina.

programme.title: The Medium
programme.desc: A shaman realizes that his nephew has been possessed. However, when unspeakable horrors start happening to his niece and to their town, the goddess that appears to have taken possession turns out not be as benevolent as it first appears.

programme.title: Expedition From Hell: The Lost Tapes (S1)
programme.desc: Self-styled survivalist and demolition expert Mickey Grosman leads a team of amateur explorers deep into the Amazon on a chaotic, death-defying quest.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold (S8)
programme.desc: Shawn finds a good luck charm in his son. Ken suffers a mechanical setback and Emily sends rookie diver Chase underwater.

programme.title: Building Icons: The Global One
programme.desc: How is this new Metropolitan city - Nangang district making technological advancements that will soon put it on par with the most advanced cities in the world.

programme.title: Ed Stafford's Rite Of Passage (S1)
programme.desc: In Mongolia, Ed must wrestle the giant heirs of Genghis Khan to become a man. He takes part in the annual rite of passage festival, Naadam.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers (Season 18b) (S18)
programme.desc: A Peugeot 205 T16 inspires Mike to upgrade its under-powered UK counterpart for a track race. Can Mike’s 205 Rallye compete with a Eurospec Peugeot?

programme.title: Mud Madness (S2)
programme.desc: Four drivers are fighting for the $100,000 prize in the Mud Cup's final race, but a shocking controversy threatens the championship.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers (S18)
programme.desc: Mike and Elvis take on a Porsche 911 in rough shape: it turns up in pieces on a trailer. If they can revive it, they’ll take it on an epic drive through the Cairngorms.

programme.title: Kindig Customs (S9)
programme.desc: The shop hits the road with their freshest builds to check out the competition. Will and Dave's cousin Brad give their views on the cars they come across.

programme.title: Wild & Weird America (S1)
programme.desc: Go on a wild journey of outrageous clips! Experience near-miss car crashes, avalanche disasters and a terrifying, death-defying glider ride.

programme.title: Wild & Weird America (S1)
programme.desc: Watch hilarious stunts, spills, and thrills gone wrong as they showcase backyard engineering, clueless humans and uncooperative machinery.

programme.title: Filthy Fortunes (S1)
programme.desc: Matt tackles a dangerous hoard in the Pennsylvania woods filled with high-value guns and ammo. The property is packed with heavy equipment and scrap.

programme.title: Ed Stafford's Rite Of Passage (S1)
programme.desc: Ed travels to the Ecuadorian rainforest to meet the Waorani, hunting monkeys and crocodiles, and making poison blow-darts.

programme.title: High Speed Chase (S2)
programme.desc: In Ohio, a stolen van leads multiple agencies on an action-packed chase, but when the driver calls 911 they discover he's not alone in the vehicle.

programme.title: Truck Dynasty (S1)
programme.desc: Jerry Jr. offers free customisation to legendary chef Guy Fieri for an Apocalypse Hellfire truck he bought at auction. Frank locks in a custom deal.

programme.title: Truck Dynasty (S1)
programme.desc: A repeat client has a wild request. When Joe changes how sales calls are handled, Ashley's family revolts. Can she quell the rebellion?

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers (S18)
programme.desc: The Austin Allegro has a reputation as one of Britain’s most unloved cars. Mike rescues a barn-find: can Elvis’ refurb prove it doesn’t deserve the label?

programme.title: ABC News At Noon - Episode 76
programme.desc: The leading news at lunchtime. Ros Childs brings you the day's top stories and the latest news as it unfolds, with reporters in the community across Australia and around the world reporting on the issues that matter to you.

programme.title: The Matchmakers - Episode 2
programme.desc: As the matchmakers send out their singles on first dates, we learn more about the matchmaker's own matches and what they think is the measure of a successful marriage.

programme.title: Ambulance Australia - Episode 2
programme.desc: Since the onset of the COVID19 pandemic the number of mental health calls received by Queensland ambulance has increased. All part of a day's work for professionals who go into each shift not knowing what lies ahead.

programme.title: Foreign Correspondent - Episode 7
programme.desc: We are your passport to the world. Our stories, told through the ABC's network of foreign correspondents, will take you to incredible places where you'll meet the people and see the forces shaping our world.

programme.title: Planet America - Episode 11
programme.desc: Trump's presidency steamrolls into its second year and a deeply divided America celebrates its 250th birthday. US voters will go to the polls for the midterm elections - will Republicans hold on to their majority in Congress?

programme.title: Media Watch - Episode 10
programme.desc: Australia's leading forum for media analysis and comment. Host Linton Besser, a four-time Walkley award-winning investigative reporter and former foreign correspondent, brings you a fearless critique of the week's journalism.

programme.title: National Press Club Address - Dr Danielle McMullen, President of AMA
programme.desc: Dr Danielle McMullen, President of AMA, addresses the National Press Club on the topic "Underpinning Australia's healthcare system: strengthening the base, not the facade".

programme.title: ABC News with Joe O'Brien - Episode 76
programme.desc: Joe O'Brien brings you a comprehensive summary of the day's events, with the latest breaking news, in depth coverage of the top stories, live crosses, interviews and explainers to bring you up to speed on what's going on.

programme.title: A Bite To Eat With Alice - Kylie Kwong
programme.desc: Legend of the Aussie food scene Kylie Kwong joins Alice with a hokkien noodle recipe to die for and Alice makes her guest an almond cake for dessert.

programme.title: The Pacific - Episode 5
programme.desc: The Pacific region is rich with culture, people and stories. Johnson Raela and Alice Lolohea bring you the stories that matter to the Pacific and the most up-to-date information, from journalists with deep regional expertise.

programme.title: AFL Premiership Season - Round 6 - Carlton v Collingwood
programme.desc: ABC Australia brings you Australian Rules football live in your lounge room every week with coverage of the 2026 AFL Premiership Season.

programme.title: If You're Listening - Black Swans - Black Swans (Part 2) The Australian Dream
programme.desc: In the 1950s three quarters of Australians were homeowners. Nowadays, house prices have sky rocketed and younger generations largely feel locked out. So where did it all go wrong?

programme.title: Ambulance Australia - Episode 2
programme.desc: Since the onset of the COVID19 pandemic the number of mental health calls received by Queensland ambulance has increased. All part of a day's work for professionals who go into each shift not knowing what lies ahead.

programme.title: Play On - Episode 1
programme.desc: Series 2 takes audiences into the inner sanctum of a Fijian rugby team, a suburban cricket team captained by a former Sri Lankan superstar and up close to the grit and tenacity of the Tiwi Bombers.

programme.title: ABC Late News - Episode 76
programme.desc: End your day with the latest on the day's top stories. ABC News has reporters across Australia and around the globe to uncover what's happening and why it matters. Presented by Michael Tetlow in Perth.

programme.title: The Business - Episode 44
programme.desc: Australia's leading daily business and finance show, bringing you up to date on market moves, economic trends and the forces affecting consumers, investors, employees and businesses big and small. Presented by Alicia Barry.

programme.title: 7.30 - Episode 60
programme.desc: Sarah Ferguson presents Australia's premier daily current affairs program, delivering agenda-setting public affairs journalism and interviews that hold the powerful to account. Plus political analysis from Jacob Greber.

programme.title: The World - Episode 60
programme.desc: There's never been a more important time to stay in touch with what's happening in our world. Girish Sawlani presents the latest international news from ABC News correspondents as well as interviews with experts and guests.

programme.title: Dr Karl's How Things Work - Guitars
programme.desc: Dr Karl visits a guitar factory to see how Australia's favourite instrument is made. Precision machines and master craftspeople work in harmony to cut, shape, bend, sand, brace, glue, paint and coax a guitar into existence.

programme.title: Secret Science - Brain Training
programme.desc: Sammy J takes you on a ride into the marvels of the mind, unveiling the secrets of lifelong neuroplasticity and discovering breakthrough science which rewrites rehabilitation and our approach to learning.

programme.desc: Australia's leading forum for media analysis and comment. Host Linton Besser, a four-time Walkley award-winning investigative reporter and former foreign correspondent, brings you a fearless critique of the week's journalism.

programme.desc: When a fugitive couple's glamorous and sometimes deadly adventure erupts into a maze of double-crosses, close escapes, false identities, and head-spinning romantic snafus, they come to realize that all they can count on is each other.

Pengkun, a skilled technician, often sneaks off early to be with his family. Guocheng is a successful insurance salesman with a loving yet nagging wife. Together, they and their families deal with the gossipy, quarrelsome Auntie Fen and her frequent clashes with Guocheng’s father-in-law.

programme.title: Our National Park III - EP 2 我们的国家公园 III
programme.desc: This is a vibrant land at the southernmost tip of China. programme.title: Murders in Amboise
programme.desc: When a violinist is found murdered near da Vinci’s tomb in a pose similar to The Vitruvian Man, Captain Alban Dutertre returns home to investigate. As more da Vinci-inspired killings follow, he and Bérénice Amarillo link this to a missing young artist.

programme.title: Binti
programme.desc: Faced with potential deportation as an immigrant, Binti, a 12-year-old vlogger plots a scheme with her new friend to bring their parents together to save her future.

programme.title: Murder in Sainte Baume
programme.desc: Carel has returned to his native Provence. With his ex-schoolmate, today head of the local police, he investigates the death of a man killed by dozens of bee stings. Soon they uncover a horrific case from the past, one that had shaken the whole village.

programme.title: Fran the Man
programme.desc: When an Irish football club becomes embroiled in an international match-fixing scandal, their hapless assistant manager, Fran Costello, finds himself way out of his league.

programme.title: A Murder Of Crows A Vigilante Justice
programme.desc: When a ransom demand suddenly appears, the disappearance of 19-year-old Tim Jatzkowski is now a cause of concern. While the boy’s father wants the police to rescue him, inspector Martin Brühl tries to convince his family to pay the ransom.

programme.title: Oskar & Lilli: Where No One Knows Us
programme.desc: Chechen siblings Oskar and Lilli face deportation from Austria but are separated in foster care after their mother’s suicide attempt. Meeting in secret, the siblings hold onto hope that they will reunite as a family someday.

programme.title: Veins Of The World
programme.desc: After his father dies in a tragic car accident, 11-year-old Amra sets out to continue his father’s vision of the traditional nomad way of life and to continue his fight against global mining companies who threaten to destroy it.

programme.title: Premiere Affaire
programme.desc: Nora, a young and an inexperienced criminal defense lawyer is charged with the case of a teenage boy accused of murdering a neighbour.

programme.title: Blizzard of Souls
programme.desc: After losing his mother and his home, Arturs finds some consolation in joining the army. However, war is nothing like he imagined.

programme.title: Moon's Walking
programme.desc: On the day of her grandmother’s memorial, 16-year-old Jung-hee escapes a volatile home and goes on a journey in search for the truth behind her grandfather’s disappearance.

programme.title: Murders in Amboise

Pengkun, a skilled technician, often sneaks off early to be with his family. Guocheng is a successful insurance salesman with a loving yet nagging wife. Together, they and their families deal with the gossipy, quarrelsome Auntie Fen and her frequent clashes with Guocheng’s father-in-law.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Tiger Food Jar + Stainless Steel Bottle + Rice Cooker
programme.desc: Tiger, a trusted century-old brand! Vacuum food jars and flasks keep meals and drinks hot or cold for 6 hours—lightweight, leak-proof, and easy to carry, perfect for meal prep or on-the-go. The compact multi-function rice cooker features an ultra-thick inner pot and versatile menus like Eco, Quick Cook, Porridge, Brown Rice, and Cake, keeping rice warm up to 12 hours with evenly cooked, fluffy results—ideal for small families. Tiger百年品牌，值得信赖！Tiger真空焖烧杯和保温壶，冷热食物皆可装，6小时长效保温保冷，轻巧不漏，携带方便，适合备餐或外出使用。Tiger 0.54L 多功能微电脑小电饭锅，内胆加厚，多种烹煮模式：节能、快煮、粥、糙米、蛋糕等，可保温12小时，米饭均匀松软，完美适合小家庭使用。

programme.title: Oskar & Lilli: Where No One Knows Us
programme.desc: Chechen siblings Oskar and Lilli face deportation from Austria but are separated in foster care after their mother’s suicide attempt. Meeting in secret, the siblings hold onto hope that they will reunite as a family someday.

programme.title: Premiere Affaire
programme.desc: Nora, a young and an inexperienced criminal defense lawyer is charged with the case of a teenage boy accused of murdering a neighbour.

programme.title: Moon's Walking
programme.desc: On the day of her grandmother’s memorial, 16-year-old Jung-hee escapes a volatile home and goes on a journey in search for the truth behind her grandfather’s disappearance.

programme.title: Hotel Barcelona (1)
programme.desc: Laura Santos returns with her troubled son Pedro to her parents’ grand hotel in Barcelona, hoping to guide him back on track. But her homecoming rekindles old family conflicts, as buried tensions resurface within the walls of Hotel Barcelona.

programme.title: Breathing Underwater
programme.desc: When Emma has to leave her picture-perfect life for a women's shelter, covered in bruises and unexpectedly pregnant, her unlikely friendship with a ragtag group of women pushes them all into a fight to take back their power.

programme.title: Happier Times, Grump
programme.desc: When Grump's wife dies, he sees no reason to live on. But just as his coffin is finished, Grump gets a new spark and a major secret! His teenage granddaughter is in trouble and needs help and wisdom from her grandfather, and the warmth of his fireplace.

programme.title: Bluebird
programme.desc: In small town Maine, a school bus driver becomes distracted during her end-of-day inspection and fails to notice a sleeping boy in the back of the bus. What happens next shatters the tranquillity of her small logging town.

programme.title: Broll: Buried Alive
programme.desc: Gravedigger Max Broll and retired soccer star Baroni team up to find Max’s stepmother Tilda, the local police commissioner, who has been abducted and buried alive in the woods. The clock is ticking – Tilda won`t survive more than 48 hours underground.

programme.title: Like Crazy
programme.desc: Two mental patients, a motor-mouthed fantasist and a tattooed introvert, who met at a community hospital, fled the hospital to embark on a road trip from Tuscany to Rome, in search of love and happiness in the open-air nuthouse - the world of sane people.

programme.title: To Kill A Mongolian Horse
programme.desc: Saina, a herdsman by day and horseback performer by night, clings to his heritage on the wintry steppes of Inner Mongolia, as he’s forced to confront the crumbling of the world he once knew.

programme.title: Hotel Barcelona (2)
programme.desc: After returning to her parents’ hotel in Barcelona, Laura spends a romantic night with deputy manager Mateo. Though drawn to him, she must stay professional - especially as her troubled son Pedro drifts further away and family conflicts resurface.

programme.title: So Far, So Close
programme.desc: Junho is a lively, sociable bar owner who enjoys being surrounded by people, yet deep inside carries a delicate yearning for the lover he lost ten years ago. Whenever he encounters someone who resembles her, he can’t help but stare, captivated by memory.

programme.title: A Murder Of Crows Hush Little Baby
programme.desc: After a lantern parade, two-year-old Paulina is found missing from her room. The chilling kidnapping hurls Investigator Martin Bruhl back into a sleepless nightmare he experienced two years ago.

programme.title: King of Devil's Island
programme.desc: Norwegian winter, early 20th century. On the boys’ home Bastoy, a new inmate leads the boys to a violent uprising against a brutal regime. How far is he willing to go to attain freedom? Based on a true story.
